caption.text: My dad made a life for us in Orange County California as an immigrant who could barely read. He made sure my mom could stay home her whole life. She gave him 8 kids and talks of her life with such gratefulness. They both had no education other than life experience. He had his own business and worked 13 hour days. They still are such an inspiration for me, even till this day. Nothing is impossible and hard work is addicting. It’s a virtue to inherit that spirit. So when I say I’m not leaving Orange County California, it’s because I know I can always make money build businesses and get what ever we want and need. Everything is doable with the spirit of “I can do anything I work hard towards.”… #mexicanspirit #mexicanpower #hardwork #californiagirl #blessed

caption.text: A question I get all the time on almost every couples post. “Tell me what prayer you prayed word for word!” Here is one version of that prayer. More than anything, I was aware of my own shortcomings and mistakes. I was aware of the ones that were not conducive towards a healthy and happy relationship. I thank God for all the work he does in me everyday. I thank God so much for my beauty of human I get to call my earth soulmate. @tpullfit_gorilla #godcenteredrelationship #happycouple #healthycouple #loveafterheartbreak #single

caption.text:
Thanks to @philipssonicare brushing our dogs teeth has become such an easy job. We used to dread this chore, but we’ve gone from brushing once a week to making it a daily act of love. 

Using the @armandhammer dog toothpaste made Powders teeth so shiny and white. We got the mint flavored one. He loved the taste and didn’t even fight it. I was worried he would not like it since it’s not chicken flavored, but I needed mint because chicken flavored is gross. Thank God he loved the taste and wanted to eat it as a treat lol. 

The Sonicare toothbrush I highly recommend for your pups. The bristles don’t move up and down but vibrate. The sonic technology blasts the plaque right off without agitating your pet. I was able to just glide over all of Powders teeth and was done in just two minutes. 

Through out the day we added @dentalfreshpets plaque and tartar fighting water additive. This makes it so easy to add a second layer of fresh breath protection! Helped his teeth to be rid of any plaque I may have missed. He loved it and there was no smell or taste. 

Everyone noticed his breath right away and the kids played with him much more comfortably. No more stinky breath for Powder the pup. #dogbreath #petcare #pethealth #smellydog #brushyourdogsteeth

caption.text: This is a typical Monday and Tuesday routine. Other days are gym days for the kids and involve weight lifting. Since Monday and Tuesday are high homework days, we tend to only walk and take it easier on them. #fitfamily #familytime #activefamily #familyworkout #bestmomanddad

caption.text: This is just for April and I’m so thankful for the prayer I prayed and the confidence I have in a world where people will send you death threats for typos. I was made for this. Calm mind calm body calm soul, all forward motion and up. People will hate you anyway, so post what is true to you. If you need help with starting content and need support, DM me🫶🏽 #successful #thriving #highviews #socialmediasuccess #buildingmybusiness

caption.text: Speaking life in to each other. Uplifting each other. Having positive and loving demeanors. Being people that are emotionally open. Never being too stubborn to break down. That is what our greatest hopes for our kids are, the things that will make them successful partners and mothers and fathers. #familymeeting #lovingfamily #strongfathers #fathers #bestdad

caption.text: We were able to get season passes with free parking for both Knots and six flags as well as soak city! We are going to be upside down all summer long! #familyfun #themeparkfun #rollercoasters #savingmoney #thrillseekers

caption.text: It’s not easy and it’s not convenient and it’s not what most people do, buts it’s a dream come true and I’m keeping my word building and choosing our morals and values and not just “letting life” take us where it will. Building our memories with purpose and effort. #familytimeisthebesttime #mixedfamily #mixedkids #familyactivities #activefamily

caption.text: Days like Easter are a perfect time for us as parents to model the attitudes, love, and habits we want our kids to carry in to their future family’s. Today was busy from the time I woke up at 6am for my Pilates class, while my whole family slept, to the moment we got back from the beach after spending a wonderful evening with friends. Every minute was filled with love and peace, and that started with me setting the vibe for my family. Taking care of myself models to them that they must as well. They are responsible for the energy they bring in to a room, and they witness their mom doing the same. God is so wise and I am his daughter, the wisdom, calm, and peace I see is from him. And all I had to do was ask for it. Thank you Jesus for your sacrifice over me 🫶🏽… #easteractivities #eastersunday #familybeachday #friendsandfamily #peacefulmindpeacefullife
